objective: Execute the accepted full blueprint master plan: complete tenant portal convergence, finish the remaining Platform Admin / Ops / finance / filing blueprint families, close rollout evidence, and preserve deferred roadmap slices without losing scope.

discussion_planning.purpose: Read canonical specs, debate design, converge on planning, and produce an accepted consensus packet.
discussion_planning.entry_gate: system analysis plus design and execution references are available in the repo

supervisor_managed_execution.purpose: Assign implementation work to owners and reviewers through the supervisor task lifecycle.
supervisor_managed_execution.exit_gate: execution discovers unresolved semantics, conflicting contracts, or wave changes that require renewed discussion

mode_transition_rules: Supervisor stays running across both modes; only routing policy changes.
discussion_planning -> supervisor_managed_execution after the consensus packet is accepted by the human.
supervisor_managed_execution -> discussion_planning when implementation hits unresolved product semantics, contract conflicts, or major planning drift.
After discussion resolves the issue, the supervisor may resume implementation mode without restarting the control plane.

discussion_loop.loop_rule: Only the current owner edits starter-draft.md. Reviewers write cited feedback in review-round-N.md. Supervisor advances the baton.

tasks.title: Fix cross-tenant booking data leak in owned-mobility API
tasks.summary_zh: GET /tenant/bookings 和 GET /tenant/bookings/:bookingId 沒有 tenant 隔離，任何租戶可讀取其他租戶的 booking。需從 x-tenant-id header 提取 tenantId，在 createTenantBooking/listTenantBookings/getTenantBooking 全部套用 filter。
acceptance: listTenantBookings() 只回傳呼叫方 tenant 的 booking
getTenantBooking() 若 bookingId 不屬於呼叫方 tenant 則回傳 404
createTenantBooking() 將 tenantId 寫入 booking record
E2E-004 通過：TEN_ACME 無法讀取其他 tenant 的 booking
tasks.next: Owner finalized: tenant booking endpoints now require x-tenant-id, create/list/get/update/cancel all enforce tenant scoping, cross-tenant access returns BOOKING_NOT_FOUND, and commit b068f92 records the approved BUG-001 fix.
tasks.commit_subject: fix(BUG-001): enforce tenant isolation for tenant bookings

tasks.title: Fix E2E-001: dispatch not triggered after tenant booking creation
tasks.summary_zh: E2E-001 在 POST /tenant/bookings 後 poll /api/dispatch/tasks 得到空結果。Phase 1 dispatch 是 ops 手動觸發，E2E test 缺少明確的 dispatch 觸發步驟。需修正 E2E-001 腳本，在 booking 後呼叫 ops dispatch 端點，或確認 auto-dispatch 是否應在 booking 建立時觸發。
acceptance: E2E-001 的 dispatch/tasks poll 在 booking 建立後能拿到至少一筆 dispatch job
修正方向記錄在 sidecar evidence 中（test fix vs service auto-dispatch）
tasks.next: Owner finalized: E2E-001 now triggers explicit POST /orders/:orderId/dispatch before polling dispatch/tasks; regression test locks reservation bookings behind an explicit dispatch step, and evidence is recorded in support/sidecars/BUG-002/BUG-002-DISPATCH-SEMANTICS-EVIDENCE.md.
tasks.commit_subject: fix(BUG-002): require explicit dispatch trigger in E2E-001

Cannot complete a green staging rerun from the current repo state: GitHub Actions is missing vars.GCP_PROJECT_ID, vars.GCP_REGION, vars.GCP_CLOUDSQL_INSTANCE, vars.GCP_RUNTIME_SERVICE_ACCOUNT (or secret GCP_RUNTIME_SERVICE_ACCOUNT), secrets.WIF_PROVIDER, and secrets.WIF_SERVICE_ACCOUNT, so remote runs fail before GCP auth or migration. This machine also cannot inspect Cloud Run directly because gcloud auth returns ACCESS_TOKEN_SCOPE_INSUFFICIENT for drts-staging. Need repo/GCP credential provisioning plus a privileged rerun of Deploy — Staging before E-11/E-12/E-13 can be collected.
